{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Foundation stage exhibition
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Foundation stage exhibition]] is described as a formality and training for real fights.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c3">''Unsouled'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Foundation stage exhibition]] was changed due to a request from the [[Heaven's Glory]] School.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
